title: BEM-849 extract blocker
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:25 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
draft=Path('governance/protocols/BEM845_CLAUDE_AGREED_PROTOCOL_DRAFT.md')
txt=read(draft)
# Extract compact blocker hints from the response text.
lines=[x.strip() for x in txt.splitlines() if x.strip()]
key=[]
for line in lines:
    low=line.lower()
    if any(k in low for k in ['blocked','blocker','missing','required','must','cannot','не ', 'нужно', 'требуется']):
        key.append(line[:500])
status='blocker_extracted' if key else 'blocker_not_found_in_draft'
next_action='patch protocol/runtime according to extracted blocker' if key else 'inspect full Claude response manually and fix extraction'
state={'bem':'BEM-849','status':status,'source_draft':str(draft),'blocker_lines':key[:40],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem849_extract_protocol_blocker.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem849_extract_protocol_blocker.md').write_text('# BEM-849 | Extract Protocol Blocker | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem849_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-849'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem849_extract_protocol_blocker.json','governance/reports/bem849_extract_protocol_blocker.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem849_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Extracted blocker lines from BEM-845 real Claude response draft to determine the repair required before protocol approval')
"""
No issue comments.
